narrative:
Mt. Healthy City has 4,432 registered voters, with 60.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 11.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 27.8%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 16.5 percentage points.
